## Runtime.Indexers.RecipesByIngredientIndexer class

Indexer that finds recipes using a specific ingredient.

Supports filtering by: - Primary usage only - Alternate usage only - Any usage

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class RecipesByIngredientIndexer extends BaseIndexer<IRuntimeRecipe, RecipeId, IRecipesByIngredientConfig> 
```
